archetypes.summary: The current setup resembles a prior period or episode, and the analogy is central.
Current developments imply important downstream effects or structural changes.
A report or dataset contains non-obvious trends, oddities, or internal tensions worth unpacking.
Consensus framing is wrong, shallow, or incomplete.
A structural change is underway and old assumptions may no longer hold.
The headline is not the real story; downstream consequences matter more.
Multiple plausible paths are outlined with implications and validation conditions.
Markets or commentators are interpreting a development incorrectly.
